title: Unified Runtime Dashboard Design
purpose: Design the unified runtime control plane dashboard that exposes active execution, event streams, lock status, replay sessions, audit status, healing actions, enforcement violations, and invariant violations.
architectural_constraints: Read-only queries, no locks held during display
Must operate using structured telemetry only
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard schema defines all 8 required views: execution, events, locks, replay, audits, healing, enforcement, invariants
Design supports CLI rendering with severity color coding
Data freshness requirements defined (< 30s for critical metrics)
Query patterns documented for each view
